An '''Imperial Biological Research Center''' was based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Najarka]], as part of the [[Imperial Complex (Najarka)|Imperial Complex]]. After [[Yearo Seville]] [[Operation 45RA|kidnapped]] [[Crying Dawn Singer]] and his entourage, they were taken to the center to be interrogated by [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] [[Interrogation (Imperial Security Bureau)/Legends|interrogators]]. While Crying Dawn Singer was transported to [[Braig Farool]], the rest of the entourage was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the facility.
